issues.description: Action type is ReturnToHand but card text specifies 'bottom of the owner's deck' - should be a different action or custom implementation. ReturnToHand returns to hand, not deck.
Target scope ChooseOpponentCharacter is incorrect - should indicate these are optional selections ('up to 1'), not mandatory. Scope should support optionality.

Two separate ReturnToHand actions with different cost restrictions are unclear. The DSL should clarify that first action targets cost ≤2 AND second action targets cost ≤1 as separate optional selections, and both should place cards at bottom of deck (not hand).
